data.title: NaaS Technology Inc. received notification from Nasdaq about minimum market value deficiency, a U.S.-listed EV charging service company in China.
data.description: NaaS Technology Inc. (Stock: NAAS) has become the initial EV charging service company listed on Nasdaq in the U.S. that operates in China. The company recently disclosed receiving a written notification, known as the "MVLS Notice" from Nasdaq on Feb 20, 2026.

data.title: ACWR will increase train speeds from 10 to 25 mph between Charlotte and Star, NC starting March 1. Various communities impacted.
data.description: In Candor, North Carolina, as of March 1, 2026, approved train speeds will see a rise from 10 to 25 miles per hour in the area stretching from Norwood heading east towards Star. This will impact various areas, such as Norwood, Mt. Gilead, with the intention of improving efficiency and connectivity.

data.title: TransMedics Group, Inc. announces inducement grants under NASDAQ rule, helf on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, in Andover, Massachusetts, TransMedics Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: TMDX) revealed significant advancements in organ transplant therapy for patients with end-stage lung, heart, and liver failure. The announcement followed an important development made on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Haemonetics CEO to speak at Raymond James 47th Annual Conference on March 2, 2026 at 10:25 am ET.
data.description: In Boston on February 20, 2026, Haemonetics Corporation (NYSE: HAE) revealed that Chris Simon, their President and CEO, is scheduled to engage in a fireside discussion with investors at the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 2, 2026, starting at 10:25 a.m. ET.

data.title: Transit Technologies launches Managed Eligibility to help paratransit agencies meet ADA timelines, reducing backlog and improving compliance.
data.description: A new centralized paratransit eligibility software, combined with specialized case management, has been successful in reducing backlog, enhancing compliance supervision, and enhancing the overall rider experience. This initiative took place in Knoxville, Tennessee on February 20, 2026. Paratransit agencies are facing growing demands to meet ADA requirements and provide efficient services to riders. This integration of software and expert-led management has shown significant improvements in operations.

data.title: Neocloud companies Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) and Applied Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: APLD) suffer as CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) faces financing issues following a 12% intraday stock drop.
data.description: On Friday, the specialized neocloud sector experienced a stress test with Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) and Applied Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: APLD) witnessing a decline in their shares in sympathy with CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV). A report from Business Insider indicated a significant financing issue for CoreWeave's infrastructure expansion, triggering a sell-off. CoreWeave shares dropped by 12% intraday due to news of funding challenges with their key partner, Blue Owl Capital (NYSE: OWL). For more details, visit a financial news platform.

data.title: NeuroPace (Nasdaq: NPCE) will report Q4 2025 financial results on March 3, 2026. Conference call at 1:30pm PT, 4:30pm ET.
data.description: Mountain View, California-based NeuroPace, Inc. (Nasdaq: NPCE), a medical device firm dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for individuals with epilepsy, declared its plans to disclose financial outcomes for Q4 of 2025 following market closure on March 3, 2026. The management will host an online conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) on the same day. Interested investors can join the call via web access.

data.title: Roofing expert Luke Mathis highlights reasons for remodeling projects going over budget, citing overlooked decisions.
data.description: In Ruston, Louisiana, on February 20, 2026, a piece discusses the common occurrence of remodeling projects exceeding budget despite careful planning by homeowners. An article by HelloNation highlights the reasons behind this trend, citing overlooked decisions made during construction that result in unforeseen costs and setbacks. The piece provides valuable insights into the matter, shedding light on the issues faced by those undertaking home renovation projects.

Reports in Venezuela: ‘Acting President Delcy Rodríguez receives the Jordanian Foreign Minister, Ayman Hussein Al-Safadi, this Friday at Miraflores. During this meeting, Venezuela and Jordan reaffirm their bilateral relations, which are strengthened through mutual recognition.

data.title: iPower reports Q2 2026 results: revenue $7.1M, gross profit $3.1M, operating expenses down 28% YoY to $5.6M, net loss $1.2M.
data.description: In Rancho Cucamonga, California, on February 20, 2026, iPower Inc. (Nasdaq: IPW) disclosed their financial performance for the fiscal second quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company experienced a revenue of $7.1 million during this period, which was influenced by strategic supply chain adjustments towards more U.S.-based sourcing. The gross profit recorded was $3.1 million, with a robust gross margin of 44.0%. Operating expenses saw a significant decline of 28% year-over-year, amounting to $5.6 million in comparison to the same quarter in 2024. iPower incurred a net loss of $1.2 million, translating to $(1.08) per share. The company's financial position indicated $2.0 million in cash and cash equivalents, $2.2 million in restricted cash, and approximately $2.2 million in digital assets.

data.title: Ultragenyx Pharmaceuticals grants 22,917 restricted stock units to 6 new hires as an inducement under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in rare disease therapies, announced on Feb. 20, 2026, the issuance of 22,917 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to six newly recruited non-executive officers. The awards were given as part of the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan and were approved by the compensation committee of the board of directors. This inducement was deemed essential for the new employees joining Ultragenyx, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The grant date for these stock units was Feb. 16, 2026.

data.title: Parex Resources nominates six directors to GeoPark's Board. Parex has an 11.8% ownership in GeoPark.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on February 20, 2026, Parex Resources Inc. ("Parex" or the "Company") disclosed its 11.8% ownership stake in GeoPark Limited ("GeoPark") (NYSE: GPRK). The company put forth six well-qualified director nominees for election to GeoPark's Board of Directors at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. All nominees are considered independent of both GeoPark and Parex as per relevant securities laws and stock exchange regulations.

data.title: Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc. will host Analyst Day on March 4, 2026 at 9:00 am ET in Toronto.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc., a prominent player in photonic quantum computing, disclosed plans to hold an Analyst Day event on March 4, 2026. The event is scheduled to commence at 9:00 am Eastern Time.

data.title: Materion Corp. to hold annual shareholder’s meeting on May 7, 2026 at 8 a.m. MT in Salt Lake City, Utah. Leader in advanced materials for various industries.
data.description: MAYFIELD HEIGHTS, Ohio-- Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) has scheduled its annual shareholder's meeting (the Annual Meeting) for May 7, 2026, at 8 a.m. MT at the Asher Adams, Autograph Collection, hotel located at 2400 W, Salt Lake City, Utah. Materion is a leading company in advanced materials solutions for key industries such as semiconductor, industrial, aerospace & defense, energy, and automotive. With almost a century of experience in specialized materials, Materion caters to high-performance sectors globally.

data.title: Host Hotels & Resorts sells Four Seasons Resort Orlando and Jackson Hole, along with St. Regis Houston.
data.description: The sale of the St. Regis Houston has been successfully finalized as announced earlier. This transaction marks the change in ownership of the renowned hotel. The deal involves a significant amount of financial consideration, with the exact figures undisclosed. The completion of this sale indicates a strategic move in the hospitality industry and will likely have an impact on the local market. The St. Regis Houston is now under new ownership, signaling a new chapter for the upscale establishment.
